languages.text: Манипулус Эоганн проводит странные опыты в Секторе Бионика, заняв имплантационный трон и мешая работе отсека. Требуется вмешательство Вольного Торговца.

Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.
languages.original_text: Манипулус Эоганн проводит странные опыты в Секторе Бионика, заняв имплантационный трон и мешая работе отсека. Требуется вмешательство Вольного Торговца.

traits.locale_text: Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

languages.text: Manipulus Eogunn führt im Sektor Bionica seltsame Experimente durch. Er hat dazu den Implantationsthron in Beschlag genommen und stört die Operationen des Moduls. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} muss etwas unternehmen.
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

traits.locale_text: Manipulus Eogunn führt im Sektor Bionica seltsame Experimente durch. Er hat dazu den Implantationsthron in Beschlag genommen und stört die Operationen des Moduls. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} muss etwas unternehmen.

languages.text: Le manipulus Eogunn mène d'étranges expériences dans le secteur Bionica et perturbe le fonctionnement du compartiment après avoir occupé le fauteuil d'implantation. L'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} est requise.
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

traits.locale_text: Le manipulus Eogunn mène d'étranges expériences dans le secteur Bionica et perturbe le fonctionnement du compartiment après avoir occupé le fauteuil d'implantation. L'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} est requise.

languages.text: 操纵者伊奥贡在仿生区进行异端实验，占用了移植王座并干扰了舱室运作。需行商浪人介入。
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

traits.locale_text: 操纵者伊奥贡在仿生区进行异端实验，占用了移植王座并干扰了舱室运作。需行商浪人介入。

languages.text: El manipulus Eogunn está llevando a cabo experimentos extraños en el Sector Bionica. Ha ocupado el trono de implantación e interferido con el funcionamiento del compartimento. Se requiere la intervención de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente.
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

traits.locale_text: El manipulus Eogunn está llevando a cabo experimentos extraños en el Sector Bionica. Ha ocupado el trono de implantación e interferido con el funcionamiento del compartimento. Se requiere la intervención de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente.

languages.text: Manipulus EogunnがSector Bionicaで奇妙な実験を行っており、移植用玉座を占拠して区画の運営を妨害している。ローグ・トレーダーの介入が必要である。
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

languages.text: Manipülus Eogunn, Sektör Biyonika'da implantasyon tahtını eline geçirdi ve kompartımanın işleyişini aksatarak tuhaf deneyler yürütüyor. Hür Tacir'in müdahalesi gerekiyor.
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn is conducting strange experiments in the Sector Bionica, having occupied the implantation throne and disrupting the compartment's operations. The Rogue Trader's intervention is required.

traits.locale_text: Manipülus Eogunn, Sektör Biyonika'da implantasyon tahtını eline geçirdi ve kompartımanın işleyişini aksatarak tuhaf deneyler yürütüyor. Hür Tacir'in müdahalesi gerekiyor.
